title: Edge Streaming Analytics Data Flow
description: Illustrates the flow of data from IoT devices through the edge analytics process to the cloud, highlighting where real-time processing and filtering occur.
relationships: Raw data streams from Devices to the Edge Gateway
Gateway pre-processes and routes data to the Analytics Engine
Analytics Engine performs real-time filtering, aggregation, and anomaly detection
Processed insights trigger Local Actions or are sent to the Cloud for deeper storage/analysis
